trade_plans.entry_trigger: 1h MACD histogram expansion and price holding above $0.0210
trade_plans.invalidation: 1h close below $0.0205 or funding rate flipping positive
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (0th percentile L/S ratio)
Price-volume divergence (low volume on price dips)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Combination of extreme sentiment exhaustion, volatility spring tension, and weak-volume selling indicates high probability of a mean-reversion bounce.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Failure to break 24h high ($3.06) with RSI divergence
confluence_signals: Extreme long crowd (93rd percentile L/S ratio)
Price-volume divergence (price rising on low volume)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Overcrowded long positioning at resistance combined with low-conviction buying volume suggests a potential long-liquidation flush.

confluence_signals: High correlation with INJ reduces diversification
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Signals are contradictory: rising OI/Price suggests trend continuation, but smart money outflow and negative funding velocity suggest a hidden distribution phase.

trade_plans.entry_trigger: Positive acceleration in funding velocity and 1h close above EMA20
confluence_signals: Extreme short crowd (2nd percentile L/S ratio)
Accelerating positive funding velocity (short squeeze signal)
trade_plans.win_rate_basis: Multiple high-conviction signals including extreme sentiment reversal, short squeeze mechanics (funding velocity), and technical bottoming at the 7d range floor.

results.cross_asset_insight: High correlation (0.87) between INJ and SAND indicates sector-wide moves in gaming/L1s, while ETHFI is decoupling with idiosyncratic short-squeeze momentum. Extreme Fear (12) suggests market-wide downside exhaustion.
